svg.text: 80–400 ms energy drop in audio stream
Pause duration fell inside VAD acceptance band
Audio chunk closed · utterance is incomplete
Transcript: "I have a fever and my"
Every stage has behaved correctly. The corrupt input looks identical to a valid one.
No confidence score, no boundary timestamp received
Generates: "That sounds like it could be serious…"
Clinical response to a sentence never finished
No stage flagged an error · no log entry marks a failure
The failure is not in any component. It is in the boundary decision at step 2 —
the only step that had access to the audio at the moment the sentence was cut.
